---
title: "Getting Started with R"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE)
```

<!-- ## Install git  -->

<!-- ### Windows -->

<!-- [https://github.com/git-for-windows/git/releases/download/v2.30.1.windows.1/Git-2.30.1-64-bit.exe](https://github.com/git-for-windows/git/releases/download/v2.30.1.windows.1/Git-2.30.1-64-bit.exe) -->

## Install R

### Windows

[https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/base/R-4.0.4-win.exe](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/base/R-4.0.4-win.exe)

### Mac

[https://cran.r-project.org/bin/macosx/R-4.0.4.pkg](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/macosx/R-4.0.4.pkg)

## Install Rtools

### Windows only

[https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools40-x86_64.exe](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools40-x86_64.exe)

## Install RStudio

### Windows

[https://download1.rstudio.org/desktop/windows/RStudio-1.4.1106.exe](https://download1.rstudio.org/desktop/windows/RStudio-1.4.1106.exe)

### Mac

[https://download1.rstudio.org/desktop/macos/RStudio-1.4.1106.dmg](https://download1.rstudio.org/desktop/macos/RStudio-1.4.1106.dmg)
